name: LATERAL EPICONDYLITIS
definition: TENNIS ELBOW = TENDINITIS (epicondylitis is a misnomer) chronic overuse syndrome involving origin of extensor carpi radialis brevis tendon

demographics.Histo: tendon microtears followed by formation of angiofibrotic hyperplasia (=

dominant_finding: focally hyperintense signal compared with muscle + less intense than fluid on all sequences
discriminating_features: focally hyperintense signal compared with muscle + less intense than fluid on all sequences

general: focally hyperintense signal compared with muscle + less intense than fluid on all sequences
